title: Creamy Herbal Squash Stir-fry
description: This Paleo-friendly Creamy Herbal Squash Stir-fry is a nutritious and satisfying meal-prep option featuring tender chunks of butternut squash, a blend of aromatic herbs, and a creamy sauce made with coconut milk.

ingredients.name: Soy Sauce or Coconut Aminos (optional for non-paleo)

instructions: Clean and peel butternut squash, then cut into bite-sized pieces.
Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add the garlic and cook until fragrant, about 1 minute.
Add the cubed butternut squash to the pan with herbs and soy sauce or coconut aminos (if using).
Deglaze the pan with 1/4 cup of coconut milk, scraping up any browned bits from the bottom of the pan.
Continue cooking for about 5-7 minutes until most of the liquid has been absorbed and the squash is tender. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Increase heat to high, add remaining coconut milk and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes or until the mixture thickens slightly.
Serve hot as a side dish or over a bed of greens.
